hero.headline: Round 11 presentation studio + evidence dock
hero.subheadline: Serious graph-reading surface with spotlight packs, quiet canvas, evidence dock and accessibility ops for massive ERP/MES/eQMS schema graphs.
hero.promise: Turn dense topology into a readable review experience without hiding technical truth.

spotlightPacks.label: Executive risk
spotlightPacks.detail: Surface high-risk, high-change and high-governance tables first for architecture and CAB reviews.

spotlightPacks.label: Governance matrix
spotlightPacks.detail: Pull approval, signature, change-control and evidence tables into one review plane.

spotlightPacks.label: Traceability chain
spotlightPacks.detail: Follow genealogy from item and revision through lot, serial and material consumption.

spotlightPacks.label: Runtime delivery
spotlightPacks.detail: Highlight runtime-facing execution surfaces that feed forms, APIs and workflow actions.

spotlightPacks.label: Quality loop
spotlightPacks.detail: Keep inspection, supplier quality, NC and CAPA tables readable as one closed loop.

spotlightPacks.label: Quiet canvas
spotlightPacks.detail: Suppress non-relevant topology and keep only the selected story plus one-hop neighbors.

evidenceModes.label: Schema evidence
evidenceModes.detail: PK/FK, column surface, indexes and relation posture on the active object.

evidenceModes.label: Governance evidence
evidenceModes.detail: Owner, approver, RLS, policies, signatures and review obligations.

evidenceModes.label: Runtime evidence
evidenceModes.detail: API contract, workflow binding, module builder usage and runtime projection readiness.

evidenceModes.label: Traceability evidence
evidenceModes.detail: Lot/serial, genealogy, inspection, event and quality-chain semantics.

legendModes.label: Semantic legend
legendModes.detail: Read card semantics, evidence ribbons and field emphasis quickly.

legendModes.label: Topology legend
legendModes.detail: Explain quiet edges, spotlight focus, cross-domain hops and neighbor glow.

legendModes.label: Governance legend
legendModes.detail: Clarify policy, RLS, approval and evidence signals in one strip.

legendModes.label: Minimal legend
legendModes.detail: Use the most compact legend for executive walk-throughs and dense review screens.

accessibilityOps.label: Balanced contrast
accessibilityOps.detail: Default layered contrast tuned for dense daily work.

accessibilityOps.label: High contrast
accessibilityOps.detail: Boost borders, text and focus halos for long review sessions.

accessibilityOps.label: Reduced motion
accessibilityOps.detail: Freeze non-essential motion and keep topology changes calm.

accessibilityOps.label: Large type scale
accessibilityOps.detail: Increase reading comfort for theatre screens and executive rooms.

dockActions.label: Copy evidence brief
dockActions.effect: Copy the current spotlight + selection narrative to clipboard.

dockActions.label: Open review theatre
dockActions.effect: Pair the round 11 dock with the round 10 review theatre.

dockActions.label: Toggle quiet canvas
dockActions.effect: Reduce topology noise to the selected story and one-hop neighborhood.

dockActions.label: Boost contrast
dockActions.effect: Switch quickly into high-contrast presentation mode.

dockActions.label: Cycle evidence mode
dockActions.effect: Move between schema, governance, runtime and traceability evidence.
